text.title: Task Creation and Parallelization Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Task Creation and Parallelization. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Every task is INVEST-shaped: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.
rule.rationale: Every task is INVEST-shaped: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.

rule.statement: Every task carries an est_tokens budget; tasks exceeding 30k must be split.
rule.rationale: Every task carries an est_tokens budget; tasks exceeding 30k must be split.

rule.statement: The wave dependency graph is acyclic; waves are numbered 0..N and contain mutually-parallel tasks.
rule.rationale: The wave dependency graph is acyclic; waves are numbered 0..N and contain mutually-parallel tasks.

rule.statement: Cross-task dependencies are listed explicitly in depends_on; implicit shared state is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Cross-task dependencies are listed explicitly in depends_on; implicit shared state is forbidden.

rule.statement: Every task names the model tier (haiku/sonnet/opus) chosen for it with a rationale.
rule.rationale: Every task names the model tier (haiku/sonnet/opus) chosen for it with a rationale.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-task-creation-parallelization.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
